data.label: OctobotWapp DODGE
data.name: OctobotWapp
data.description: Send WhatsApp messages or create groups via OctobotWapp API

inputParams.label: Tool Name
inputParams.name: toolName
inputParams.description: Specify the name of the tool

inputParams.label: Tool Description
inputParams.name: toolDesc
inputParams.description: Specify the description of the tool
inputParams.default:
Send WhatsApp messages or create groups via OctobotWapp API.
Input parameters:
- recipients: For messages: comma-separated numbers or group IDs. For group creation: comma-separated participant numbers
- text_message: For messages: the text to send. For group creation: the group name/subject
- group_picture_url (optional): URL of the group picture when creating groups

inputParams.label: Message Type
inputParams.name: type_message
inputParams.description: Type of message to send or create group

inputParams.label: Media File Path
inputParams.name: media_path
inputParams.description: Full path to media file (required for image/video/document messages)

inputParams.label: Schedule Time
inputParams.name: time_to_send
inputParams.description: Schedule time in format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss (leave empty for immediate sending)

inputParams.label: Timezone
inputParams.name: timezone
inputParams.description: Timezone for scheduled message (required if time_to_send is set)

inputs.toolDesc:
Send WhatsApp messages or create groups via OctobotWapp API.
Input parameters:
- recipients: For messages: comma-separated numbers or group IDs. For group creation: comma-separated participant numbers
- text_message: For messages: the text to send. For group creation: the group name/subject
- group_picture_url (optional): URL of the group picture when creating groups

outputAnchors.name: OctobotWapp
outputAnchors.label: OctobotWapp
outputAnchors.description: Send WhatsApp messages or create groups via OctobotWapp API
